backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the study planner backend, handling user profiles (free/premium tiers), feature access checks, guest mode, and including authorization and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: fixing the theme colour selector to persist and apply CSS custom properties, and fixing the revision day screen to show scheduled tasks instead of motivational quotes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose, key changes, and design patterns used across the React app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, primary, card, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component defining TanStack Router routes; redirects root to dashboard without auth checks, shows ProfileSetupModal only for authenticated non-guest users, and wraps all routes in a SubscriptionProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdBanner.tsx: Dismissible ad banner component that shows an upgrade prompt to non-premium users and opens a PaywallScreen when clicked.
frontend/src/components/AdvancedFocusSet: Premium-gated focus settings panel with tabs for custom Pomodoro intervals, ambient sound selection, and session history; shows a loading state while premium status is being checked.
frontend/src/components/AdvancedStatisti: Renders a premium-gated advanced analytics section with subject breakdown bar charts, weekly trend area charts, and a completion pie chart using Recharts. Shows a paywall prompt for non-premium users.
frontend/src/components/BottomTabBar.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs (Home, Setup, Focus, Progress, Settings) that highlights the active route and provides press animations.
frontend/src/components/CelebrationAnima: Canvas-based confetti burst overlay that auto-dismisses after ~2 seconds and calls onComplete; displayed when all tasks are finished.
frontend/src/components/DailyMotivationC: Displays a deterministically selected daily motivational quote from a hardcoded list, cycling by day of year.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component that wraps pages with a sticky header (logo + theme toggle) and a bottom tab bar, constraining content to a max-width mobile layout.
frontend/src/components/NextFocusSession: Card that suggests the next Pomodoro focus session based on the first incomplete task or active exam, with a button that navigates to the focus route.
frontend/src/components/PaywallScreen.ts: Modal dialog for upgrading to premium, showing free vs. premium feature comparison and monthly/yearly plan selection with trial and subscribe actions via the subscription context provider.
frontend/src/components/PremiumGate.tsx: Wrapper component that renders children for premium users and shows an UpgradePrompt for non-premium users, suppressing the gate while premium status is loading.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new (non-guest) users to enter their name and saves their profile via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation to complete onboarding.
frontend/src/components/QuickActions.tsx: Renders three quick-action buttons (Add Task, Start Focus, Progress) that navigate to their respective routes using TanStack Router.
Displays dismissible alert banners for exams occurring within the next 3 days and for pending tasks scheduled for today, derived from the provided exams array.
frontend/src/components/SmartStudyInsigh: Computes and displays up to three AI-style study insights (completion rate, weak subjects, revision reminders) from task data, gating the full card behind a premium paywall.
frontend/src/components/StudyTipCard.tsx: Shows a daily rotating study tip selected deterministically by day-of-year from a hardcoded list of 15 tips.
frontend/src/components/ThemeSelectorSec: Renders a grid of colour theme presets where the first three are free and the rest require premium, triggering a paywall callback for locked themes.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A small icon button that toggles between light and dark mode using the `useTheme` hook.
frontend/src/components/UpgradePrompt.ts: Displays a premium upgrade prompt with a highlighted feature, a list of all premium features, and an upgrade button that opens the PaywallScreen.
frontend/src/contexts/SubscriptionContex: Provides a React context that exposes subscription provider, status, and `isPremium` flag sourced from the `useSubscription` hook to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCelebrationTrigger: Tracks whether a celebration animation should be shown when progress reaches 100%, triggering at most once per day using localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomTheme.ts: Manages a set of color theme presets and applies the active theme's OKLCH CSS variables to the DOM, persisting the selection in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useExamCountdown.ts: Calculates the number of days remaining until an exam date (stored in nanoseconds), returning flags for whether the exam is today or in the past.
frontend/src/hooks/useFocusSessionHistor: Manages a localStorage-backed history of up to 10 focus/break timer sessions, providing add and clear operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestMode.ts: Manages guest mode state with a persistent device ID in localStorage, auto-activating guest mode by default and providing enter/exit callbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestToAuthMigrati: Provides a callback to migrate a guest session to an authenticated session by exiting guest mode, with a placeholder for future data merging.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalDailyProgress: Tracks daily study progress (completed vs. total count) in localStorage, resetting automatically on a new day and computing a completion percentage.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalProfile.ts: Stores and retrieves a user's display name from localStorage, providing a setter that trims whitespace.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStreak.ts: Tracks a study streak (current, longest, last active date) in localStorage, resetting the streak if more than one day has been missed and providing an increment callback.
frontend/src/hooks/usePaywallTrigger.ts: Controls paywall visibility based on whether the user has completed a task and whether the paywall has been dismissed, persisting both flags in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/usePremiumTestingMode: Toggles a premium testing mode flag that is persisted in localStorage, allowing developers to simulate premium access.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for exam CRUD and task management, supporting both authenticated backend calls and guest mode via localStorage, including a guest study plan generator that distributes topics across days.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscription.ts: Manages subscription state (free/trial/monthly/yearly) persisted in localStorage, exposing methods to start trials, subscribe, cancel, and check premium status.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Manages light/dark theme state, persisting the preference to localStorage and toggling the `dark` class on the document root.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, an indigo-based CSS custom property palette for light and dark modes, and shared utility classes like glass-card and gradient-primary.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying today's study tasks for the active exam, progress tracking, streak, exam countdown, and a celebration animation on task completion.
frontend/src/pages/ExamSetup.tsx: Form page for creating a new exam study plan with subjects and topics, enforcing a paywall for multiple exams on non-premium authenticated users and supporting guest mode.
frontend/src/pages/FocusMode.tsx: Pomodoro-style focus timer page with configurable work/break intervals, ambient sound selection (premium), session history tracking, and an SVG circular progress indicator.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the app's login/landing page with Internet Identity login and guest mode options, featuring animated feature pills, a logo, and a premium badge.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressTracking.tsx: Displays study progress stats (streak, completed tasks, study hours) and a weekly bar chart using data from exam and progress hooks, with loading skeletons and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page allowing users to edit their display name, toggle dark/light theme, manage premium status, and access theme customization and paywall screens.
frontend/src/types/features.ts: Defines TypeScript types and configuration records for all premium features, including display names, descriptions, and icons, plus a full list of premium feature keys.
frontend/src/utils/premiumCheck.ts: Custom hook that consolidates premium status from three sources (backend profile, subscription context, and testing mode), returning a unified isPremium flag and loading state.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, font families, and animation keyframes for the app's design system.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for two bug fixes: the theme colour selector not applying/persisting themes, and the revision day screen incorrectly showing a motivational quote instead of scheduled revision tasks.
